rawAssistant: In a bond, trust is forged between you and your companion. That bond can shift the way your monster evolves. A strong bond can bring out the best in them, but if it falters, their traits may become unpredictable. I've seen bonds like that with Thornbeast before – its fire burst's intensity can be a blessing or a curse, depending on how well you know each other.
